Hey guys, a really warm welcome to track two of TenX sales pages. It is so awesome having you here. This is going to be the 15 point sales page in a day method. And it's a framework I've used over the last three years to create high converting sales pages for some of the top trainers, experts, coaches, and consultants across multiple industries. The methods and strategies you're going to learn in track two can be linked to about 20 million dollars in online launch revenue over the past few years alone. But more importantly, it will give you a reliable, intuitive framework for confidently tackling what for many business owners and copywriters alike is the most intimidating asset in any funnel. Not only that, but we're going to use the data collection methods and all the information we gather from there to really be the base of all your marketing messaging that will serve you across your entire funnel. Cool. So before we get too deep, I just want to make sure everyone's in the right place. So this track has been specifically designed for coaches and consultants, for experts, for educators, course creators, trainers, and of course, the copywriters who write for them. As long as you're selling stuff online, this track will be of immense value for you. It's just that it's going to be in particular use for coaches, consultants, experts, educators, course creators, and trainers because the methods we're going to be using to gather information are methods that these people have a lot of existing experience with. But that said, as long as you're selling stuff online, as long as you're creating a sales page, this track is going to be valuable to you. If you are a copywriter specifically, this method will help you speed up your process and really cut down on the time it takes you to write a sales page. Now, I remember the first time I started offering sales pages for a client, this project would take me about two weeks, 50 hours. It would be the most stressful part of all the deliverables I was offering. And as such, I would kind of stop offering it. I lost the confidence to do it. That cost me probably quite a lot of income in those earlier years of my freelance career when I really could have used it. This method will give you the confidence to serve your clients with a sales page, deliver more value to them, and of course, earn more revenue as someone who could provide that value to them. The other thing I want to touch on here is that this track will show you how and where to repurpose elements of your sales page into your email sequences. Now this is like a secret that I've only shared a few times with other copywriters, but there are elements of your sales page that could be repurposed into the sales emails in the final 48 hours of any launcher promotion, which really just cuts down on the workload while using the right elements that we're coaching in both the email context and on the sales page context. And finally, this is going to give you a stack of both fun and revealing data collection methods that clients actually enjoy partaking in. This is one of my most enjoyable parts of the process. And it could actually be used as a billable service itself, and I'm going to show you how to do that later on with what I call the launch Bible. So if you're a coach, course creator, or expert, you'll be able to write a sales page that converts even if you're not in a position to bring a copywriter onto your team quite yet. It's something we speak about so much, even if you can hire a copywriter, you do need to take at least some ownership over that process. You need to understand if what you're hiring someone to deliver is actually any good. So this will at the very least empower you to do that. And if you're not in a position to bring on a copywriter to do this job for you, it'll give you the tools to be able to do it quickly. In addition to that, you'll be able to do so by leveraging your existing skill set as a coach or educator instead of trying to become an expert copywriter overnight. And in turn, you're going to gain a deeper understanding of your audience so that you can serve them more fully and with greater empathy. One of my favorite byproducts of this process is that we've had coaches and course creators that have completely shifted and restructured their product suite after doing these exercises. When you really go deep into your avatar and these empathy visualizations that we're going to do later, you're going to get super in tune with what your market really needs and how they want to be heard and how they want to be served. Very often that will actually dictate stuff all the way on the product creation and offer level. Now, wherever you land on the spectrum, here's how we're going to do it. Everything in this program is designed to be execution and implementation focused. So I do want to ask that you complete the work in each module before moving on. Everything really is cumulative and it's not designed to be a brain dump or theory based course. It's meant to be executed step by step. The second point I want to bring up is that this is a theme plate, not a template. Anyone who took 10X launches knows the difference, but I'll repeat it here. We don't want to get too rigid. This 15 point structure is not gospel. I break my own rules. As you'll see in the examples, I break my own rules. That said, if this is the first time you're writing a sales page, I do invite you to lean on this proven framework. On the other hand, if you already have experience and feel confident about calling some audibles, do so as well as long as you're hitting the right emotional beats and coaching the right elements that that particular section calls for. And finally, momentum is everything. You're going to spend the bulk of your time in module two, gathering the raw materials for every part of your sales page. And from there, the lessons will gradually get shorter and shorter and designed for you to, well, write. Examples will be provided, but please only lean on those if you hit a block or need a spark or a deeper understanding on the applications of a lesson. Otherwise, I really do prefer that you use your energy to move forward, to write, to not get stuck in your head or intellectualizing the information, but instead to just take what you've learned and apply it as quickly as possible while it's still fresh. So with all that said, meet me in the next video where I'll show you a quick breakdown of how this track is structured and how to move through it as efficiently as possible. I'll see you in the next lesson.
